query: SELECT p.name, p.imageUrl, p.basePriceFixed, c.name as categoryName FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE p.isActive = 1 AND p.imageUrl IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p.displayOrder LIMIT 8
